feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: PMNR 2026: UNC Neuroscience Retreat
entry.content:
Yesterday I had the pleasure of attending the UNC Neuroscience Center Retreat PMNR 2026. It was a fantastic experience, a great opportunity to learn about the breadth of neuroscience research happening across UNC and to meet some really cool people working in the space.

I presented a poster and got some thoughtful feedback and interesting conversations out of it. Below you can check it out:
entry.summary: Presented a poster at the UNC Neuroscience Center Retreat and had a great time connecting with the neuroscience community.

entry.title: SHPE 2024
entry.content:
I recently had the pleasure of attending SHPE 2024 hosted in Anaheim California!

It was a wonderful experience. It was both my first professional conference and my first time in California.
entry.summary: I recenetly was able to attend SHPE 2024.
